positive: Minimalist illustration of a rising sun over abstract geometric mountains and a stylized stylized wave pattern. The scene uses a limited, calming color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and cream. Strong clean silhouettes and crisp lines, suitable for a screen print. Central composition with negative space balance. Graphic, symmetrical, perfect for apparel merchandise.
